---
title: exported
description: "Document exported declarations."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Document exported declarations. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
type Client struct{}
```

## Good

```go
// Client sends requests.
type Client struct{}
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only exported`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
